---

A proper Bolognese takes time. The soffritto is the foundation — without it, the
sauce lacks depth. Use a heavy-bottomed pan and resist the urge to rush the
initial cooking of the vegetables.

## Ingredients

- 300g minced beef
- 150g minced pork
- 1 batch soffritto
- 200ml whole milk
- 150ml dry white wine
- 400g canned tomatoes
- Salt and black pepper

## Method

Brown the meat in batches over high heat. Deglaze with wine and reduce
completely. Add the soffritto, milk, and tomatoes. Cook on the lowest possible
heat for at least two hours, stirring occasionally.
